verification.usageEndpoint: GET /v1/billing/usage returns paginated usage records with env-supplied quotas
verification.checkoutEndpoint: POST /v1/billing/checkout returns 410 Gone with OSS message
verification.checkoutSessionEndpoint: POST /v1/billing/checkout-session returns 410 Gone with OSS message
verification.portalEndpoint: POST /v1/billing/portal returns 410 Gone with OSS message
verification.noStripeCalls: No stripe.com calls at boot (zero Stripe references in boot log)
verification.quotaFromEnv: Quotas enforced from MAX_PARALLEL_INVESTIGATIONS=5, MAX_AGENTS_PER_RUN=8 env vars
